title: Choo Choo City
description: A fairly large modpack with many mods based around MTR trains, building/decoration, and building help.
body:
# Choo Choo City
This is a modpack I made for a server with my friends where we wanted to build a big city with lots of trains.

As a result this modpack mainly includes train mods, building and decoration mods, and optimisation mods. However, there are a few QoL mods such as a minimap, and a mod allowing for custom horns and music discs.

> [!WARNING]
> While a shaderpack is included, the use of shaders is not recommended with MTR as it can cause issues with signs and models being displayed.

Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
